serverInfo.name: Nylas MCP Server
serverInfo.title: Nylas
serverInfo.description: Typed tools for email, calendar, and contacts across Gmail, Outlook, Exchange, and any IMAP provider. Works with any MCP-compatible client (Claude Code, Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf, VS Code, Codex CLI).

authentication.description: Use a Nylas API key as the Bearer token. The same key used for direct Nylas API calls.

tools.name: confirm_send_draft
tools.description: Required before sending a draft (safety confirmation)

tools.name: confirm_send_message
tools.description: Required before sending a message (safety confirmation)

tools.name: get_grant
tools.description: Look up a grant by email address

tools.name: epoch_to_datetime
tools.description: Convert Unix timestamp to human-readable date

safety.notes: send_message and send_draft require a preceding call to confirm_send_message or confirm_send_draft. This two-step flow prevents the agent from sending emails without explicit user confirmation.
